payload.cause: Node 24 CI exposed order-dependent default resource lookup across nested explicit execution boundaries: a child reused the parent only when the parent resource resolved first.
payload.resolution: Stop default resource lookup at the nearest explicit boundary, prove order independence in Lite, update the React boundary contract, and replay all required checks.
